name: No-Cholesterol Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan with nonstick coating and set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugars, oil, and egg whites. Beat until well blended.
3. Add the remaining sugars, oat bran, baking soda, cinnamon, and allspice or nutmeg; stir just until moistened.
4. Stir in shredded apples. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes. Cool.
6. If desired, sift powdered sugar over the cake.
